---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | One Sided Selection"
image: social-cards/imbalenced-one-sided.png
---

# 🏗️ One Sided Selection {#sec-imbalenced-one-sided}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## One Sided Selection
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
